task: go towards the yellow block and pick it up
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A white cabinet with a black handle is on a wooden surface. A white tray is on the floor. A yellow block is on the wooden surface, near the cabinet. The yellow block is a cube with a matte finish. STRATEGY - First, reach towards the yellow block to grasp it. Since the block is on the surface, a direct grasp on its body is possible. The task is a single pick-up, so no transport or placement is needed. Failure modes include misgrasping (e.g., grabbing the cabinet handle instead) or not reaching the block. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: reach the yellow block at its body for a stable grasp. Step 2: grasp the yellow block to lift it.
Goal: holding(yellow_block)
Scene: yellow_block, cabinet, tray, wooden_surface
Step 1: reach(yellow_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow block
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, yellow_block, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, yellow_block) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(yellow_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow block
  contact: holding(yellow_block) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(yellow_block)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the yellow block
the body of the yellow block
